reasoning: With a knowledge cutoff in October 2025 and no active web search tool to fetch live market probabilities or macroeconomic data, I am predicting the probability based on base rates and standard monetary policy cycles. Often after a cut, continuous cuts or a longer period of pausing occur; alternating "cut-pause-cut" demands a specific economic trajectory where data briefly halts but then re-triggers cuts. Based on typical implied probabilities in Fed Funds futures for such alternating multi-meeting paths, the odds typically hover between 5% and 15%. I estimate roughly an 8% chance of this exact combination resolving correctly, recognizing the tight constraints of predicting three separate binary/trinary outcomes.
